title: Referred publications 2020
description: You may need to refer to some of these publications and rulings to prepare your 2020 tax return.
keywords: Publication, Publications, Rulings and determinations, TaxPack, Tax return, TaxTime, 2020, referred publications, referred publication

content_blocks.text: To help you complete your 2020 tax return, we have provided a list of other publications that will help you to understand your tax obligations and complete your tax return. Some publications are essential to complete some items.

items: Attribution managed investment trust (AMIT) tax return instructions 2020
Attribution managed investment trust member annual statement and standard distribution statement: guidance notes for trustees 2020
Family trust election, revocation or variation 2020
Franking account tax return and instructions 2020
Guide to foreign income tax offset rules 2020
Personal investors guide to capital gains tax 2020
Refund of franking credit instructions and application for individuals 2020
Refund of franking credits for individuals - application form 2020
Research and development tax incentive schedule 2020
Research and development tax incentive schedule instructions 2020
Self-managed superannuation fund annual return instructions 2020
Strata title body corporate tax return and instructions 2020
Timor Sea Treaty – Joint Petroleum Development Area instructions 2020

content_text:
To help you complete your 2020 tax return, we have provided a list of other publications that will help you to understand your tax obligations and complete your tax return. Some publications are essential to complete some items.
## Popular publications
- Individual tax return instructions
## Publications
- Attribution managed investment trust (AMIT) tax return instructions 2020
- Attribution managed investment trust member annual statement and standard distribution statement: guidance notes for trustees 2020
- Business and professional items 2020
- Capital gains tax (CGT) schedule 2020
- Company tax return 2020
- Company tax return instructions 2020

- Deductions for prepaid expenses 2020
- Dividend and interest schedule 2020
- Family trust election, revocation or variation 2020
- Film industry incentives 2020
